analysis.short_title: Global Feature Importance for Alzheimer Disease
analysis.markdown:
This horizontal bar chart displays the global feature importance for the 'Alzheimer Disease' class, measured by the mean absolute SHAP value. The features are listed on the y-axis, and their corresponding SHAP values are represented by the length of the red bars and numerical labels at the end of each bar.

| Feature | Mean(|SHAP value|) |
| :--- | :--- |
| Beta | +0.19 |
| Zaeta | +0.12 |
| Theta | +0.06 |
| Alpha | +0.04 |
| Delta | +0.02 |
| Gamma | +0.02 |
visible_text: Global Feature Importance for Class: Alzheimer Disease
